name: BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Added
notes: This building block detects account, group, or policy additions.
bb_references: BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Added on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Computer Account Added, Authentication.Group Added, Authentication.Policy Added, Authentication.User Account Added
TD_list: APPLY BB:UBA : Authentication User or Group or Policy Added on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event category for the event is one of the following Authentication.Computer Account Added, Authentication.Group Added, Authentication.Policy Added, Authentication.User Account Added
